title: RAYE – Coca-Cola Roxy Atlanta
description: British singer-songwriter RAYE brings her blend of pop, R&B, and soul to Coca-Cola Roxy. Known for chart-topping hits and an electric live show. Great date night — catch her before she heads to bigger arenas.

title: Tedeschi Trucks Band & Jason Isbell – Ameris Bank Amphitheatre
description: Two of America's premier roots-rock acts team up for an unforgettable night. Tedeschi Trucks Band and Jason Isbell deliver blues, soul, and Americana perfection. Worth the drive to Alpharetta.

title: La Riddim Fest
description: Caribbean music celebration featuring soca, reggae, and Afrobeat vibes. Food, dancing, and culture on Atlanta's iconic Peachtree Street. Great outdoor date event.

title: PASOFINO Dance Social – Salsa & Bachata
description: Monthly salsa and bachata social with lessons and dancing. Perfect for couples who want to learn or practice together. Intimate crowd, great vibes.

title: Illumine 2026 – Oakland Cemetery
description: The 19th annual illuminated art experience transforms Atlanta's historic Oakland Cemetery into a nighttime wonderland of colorful light installations. LAST NIGHT OF THE EVENT — extremely romantic.

title: EN ViVo Wednesday + Salsa Wednesday – Tongue & Groove
description: Weekly salsa and bachata night at Atlanta's premier Latin dance venue. Live music component with EN ViVo. Great energy — perfect Wednesday date.

title: Celestial Perspectives – Exhibition Opening Reception
address: Arts Institute of Atlanta, Atlanta, GA
description: Installation-based exhibition featuring textile artwork. Opening reception offers a sophisticated, cultured date experience. Great conversation starters.

title: Florence + The Machine – Everybody Scream Tour
description: Florence Welch delivers a breathtaking live spectacle — soaring vocals, theatrical staging, iconic anthems. Make it a special occasion anniversary-type date.

title: Disclosure Live – Two Nights at The Eastern
address: 800 Old Flat Shoals Rd SE, Atlanta, GA 30316
description: British electronic duo Disclosure performs two nights at The Eastern. House music masterclass in an intimate venue. Great for couples who love to dance.

title: Paint & Sip at Muse Paintbar – The Battery
description: Couples paint together while enjoying wine and creating art. Located at The Battery — combine with dinner and drinks for the perfect laid-back date.

title: SALVAGE & SINEMA – Dusk Cinema Experience
description: Unique outdoor cinema experience with a twist — bring your own drinks and enjoy films under the stars. Romantic and unconventional.

title: Helium Comedy Club – Dustin Nickerson
description: Headlining comedian Dustin Nickerson brings his wit to Atlanta's premier comedy club. Combine with dinner nearby for the perfect comedy date night.

title: Helium Comedy Club – Lewis Belt
description: Rising comedy star Lewis Belt headlines the In The Other Room experience. Intimate setting, great comics — perfect low-key date.

title: Red Clay Comedy Festival
description: Month-long comedy festival featuring dozens of comedians across multiple Atlanta venues. Great variety for comedy-loving couples.

title: Epic Fest ATL Carnival 2026
description: 6 events, 6 themes, 1 epic weekend. Caribbean carnival vibes with multiple parties and events. Great for couples who love to party together.

title: AfroVibez 2026
description: Afrobeat-focused event bringing together the best in African music and culture. Great vibes, dancing, and culture in one place.

title: R.A.S Memorial Weekend ATL – Reggae/Afrobeats/Soca
description: 100% Reggae/Afrobeats/Soca. One of Atlanta's premier Caribbean music events. Dancing till 4AM. Memorial Day weekend staple.

title: Date Night All White
description: Atlanta's No 1 Celebration for Couples. Dress in all white for an unforgettable night of music and dancing. Romantic and stylish date night.

title: The 40th Annual Sweet Auburn Springfest
description: Atlanta's largest street festival returns for its 40th year celebrating the historic Sweet Auburn neighborhood. Live music, food vendors, cultural programming. Great free date.

title: Atlanta Jazz Festival 2026
description: The 49th Annual Atlanta Jazz Festival at Piedmont Park — one of the nation's largest FREE jazz festivals. Three days of world-class jazz outdoors. Pack a picnic and enjoy.
